Exceptional Service
For Your Home
& Business.

Your home or business deserves the best when it comes to heating, cooling, and plumbing. We deliver top-tier service, expert craftsmanship, and 24/7 support. Same-day appointments are available.

Residential HVAC & Plumbing

From AC repair in triple-digit Las Vegas heat to furnace installation before a Utah winter — our NATE-certified team keeps your home comfortable year-round. Licensed plumbers on call too.

Explore Residential

Commercial Refrigeration & HVAC

Rooftop units, walk-in coolers, commercial plumbing, government contracts — full-service commercial solutions for businesses of every size across 5 states, available 24/7.

Explore Commercial

Why Homeowners Choose Silver State

Fast, Reliable
Service.
Every Time.

Whether it's installing a new air conditioning system, performing emergency plumbing repairs, or ensuring your heating system runs efficiently — we're dedicated to creating environments that promote comfort and peace of mind.

  • Same-day appointments available across all markets
  • NATE-certified, licensed & fully insured technicians
  • Transparent pricing — no hidden fees or surprises
  • 24/7 emergency response, day or night
Book a Service

20+

Years of Experience

15+

Expert Technicians

Our Services

Expert HVAC &
Plumbing Solutions

Our customers trust us because we put their needs first. From fast response times to transparent pricing, we make home repairs stress-free. Whether it's fixing a broken AC in the summer, installing a new water heater, or keeping your business's refrigeration running smoothly, we get the job done right. Serving Nevada, California, Arizona, Utah & Texas.

Air Conditioning & Cooling

Beat the heat with efficient, reliable AC repair, installation, and maintenance services that ensure your indoor comfort even during the hottest days.

Heating Solutions

From furnace tune-ups to full system installations, our licensed experts deliver warm, safe, and energy-efficient heating for your home or commercial space.

Plumbing Expertise

Fast, friendly, and fully licensed plumbing services — from routine inspections and drain cleaning to complex water heater and pipe repairs.

Commercial Services

Keep your business running smoothly with our specialized commercial services. We design, repair, and maintain systems that protect your products and ensure comfort for your team.

Available Day & Night

Where Reliability
Meets Expert Service.

Book Now

24/7 Emergency HVAC

AC failure or heating emergency — we respond around the clock.

Maintenance Club

Biannual tune-ups, priority scheduling & member-only discounts.

Flexible Financing

Get the comfort you need now with affordable payment options.

1,000+

Five-Star Reviews

NATE

Certified Technicians

20+

Years of Experience

24/7

Emergency Service

What Our Clients Say

I had a great experience with Silver State. I called them the afternoon of May 1, they sent Vince out to do an estimate on May 2, and I had a complete installation of a new air conditioning and heating system done on May 3.

Ellen C. Smith

Las Vegas, NV

Vanessa was wonderful. She took the time to explain everything she found during my maintenance and showed me pictures to back up what she was saying. We ended with her getting me an estimate of potential work to be done so I can prioritize.

Diane Gallock

Las Vegas, NV

Quick response and quick scheduling. Got my problem fixed within 24 hours. They were very professional and trustworthy. They offered to take their shoes off in my house and went out of their way to ensure I was happy.

Barbara Chandler

Henderson, NV

My technician Chris walked me through everything he found and explained why and what needed to be done. He was amazing. I believe in the honesty this company has always shown and highly recommend them.

Barbara Heid

Las Vegas, NV

USE THIS COMPANY! How many companies can 'wow' you? They installed a unit for me in 2022. It needed some warranty work. THEY HONORED IT! Seems rare these days.

Jim Asche

Las Vegas, NV
